data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — suite-engine.sh is at tests/lib/suite-engine.sh, uses run_test_suite() function, test files follow assert.sh pattern with PASSED/FAILED summary line. RED zone logic lives in record-test-status.sh with get_red_zone_line_number(), parse_failing_tests_from_output(), get_test_line_number() functions. Epic adds SUITE_TEST_INDEX env var support to suite-engine.sh for RED-zone tolerance.
